author: @xeridian
text: Dave Filonis work on The Bad Batch and Rebels and the Clone Wars is a treasure. (yes I know GL was integral) BUT, Now maybe we can get some good shit. I want a Live Action Bad Batch TBH, but ill take anything that just DOESNT SUCK! I believe that Dave Filoni wanted to do all the right things but KK probably kept shitting down his throat. If you look at his passion projects like all the animated series he has done, is probably some of the best stuff in the entire franchise. That's because Before KK and During KK she didnt care about anything except the big Money Films so she left him alone on those smaller projects which were all so much better. I have faith that when KK leaves, Dave's superpowers will course correct and show us the goods. It just wouldnt make sense otherwise. I mean yes, I could be wrong, but this is Star Wars: The Last Hope. I got one last chance for SW left in me.  KK is a legend alright, a Legend of Fuckery.

author: @MLDPDarthJoker
text:
“The Mandalorian & Grogu” & “Starfighter” are the first 2 releases in Filoni & Brennan’s tenure, & if they flop like I think they will, I think the mainstream media will try to portray those flops as primarily Filoni & Brennan’s failure & ignore Kennedy’s role in their production. When those films were made, Filoni was Chief Creative Officer while Brennan was General Manager, so they will both obviously deserve a lot of blame for those films, but I think a lot of people will try to ignore Kennedy’s role.

If the Rey film officially gets cancelled, there will be a lot of backlash directed at Filoni & Brennan even though the film’s a guaranteed flop & is in production hell.

Bob Chapek was blamed for Disney’s flops during his tenure as Disney CEO even though most, if not all, of those flops were primarily produced during Bob Iger’s tenure.

The difference between Iger’s & Kennedy’s departure’s is that Iger came back to Disney after Chapek became the fall guy during the fallout of Iger’s decisions as a way to “fix” Disney, which we all know failed. I don’t believe Kennedy will attempt a comeback after the fallout due to her age. This is just my personal speculation, so I could be wrong, but I believe that by Filoni getting a larger portion of the blame than he would get if Kennedy was still President, she might think her legacy will be more intact, which I think was also the same logic behind the fake Kennedy vs Iger rumors from a few months ago. Us fans will always remember exactly how Star Wars died.

“Maul: Shadow Lord” has potential as a show this year, but given Filoni’s recent work, I have a lot of concerns, especially after he & Favreau screwed up with “Book Of Boba Fett,” which was also a mobster show. If they had someone with quality experience in the gangster genre like David Chase, Francis Ford Coppola, or Martin Scorsese, the story might work.

“The Ninth Jedi,” an anime show by Production IG that releases this year, is the only upcoming Star Wars project I’m actually excited for after the 2 shorts on “Visions” leading up to the show, & while Filoni had to approve it as CCO, I don’t know how much direct involvement he & others at Lucasfilm have in its production due to it being made by an anime studio. Amongst upcoming projects, this show has the highest ceiling from a quality standpoint simply due to the fact that it’s made by people not in Lucasfilm, which should actually embarrass Lucasfilm.
